title: Resolution No. 3 of 2008 Assigning TRA Responsibility for .bh and البحرين Domain Names
summary: Assigns TRA responsibility for registration and management of the .bh and البحرين country-code top-level domains as national resources and underpins the Bahrain Domain Registry regime.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.internet_: Assigns TRA responsibility for Bahrain country-code domain names.

notes: Related instruments: Amended in 2018 according to Bahrain Domain Registry official materials
